jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Ambrane
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Ambrane! We are hiring a SEO Specialist for our Howrah team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Ambrane:
Ambrane is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ambrane!
